title: ASR Outdoor Mini EDC Small Pocket Knife Multi Tool - LOGO Blue
description:
Stay prepared on the go with the ASR Outdoor Mini EDC Pocket Knife Multi Tool. This compact multitool features a knife blade, scissors, nail file, nail cleaner and integrated keyring in a lightweight design that measures just 2.25 inches when closed. Small enough to fit in a pocket, backpack or emergency kit, this mini multitool is ideal for camping, hiking, fishing, hunting, travel and everyday carry. Each tool folds neatly into the handle and locks into position during use, while the built-in keychain ring allows for easy attachment to keys, gear bags, belt loops and more.

ASR Outdoor Mini EDC Small Pocket Knife Multi Tool - LOGO Blue
The ASR Outdoor Mini EDC Pocket Knife Multi Tool is a compact and versatile addition to your everyday carry gear, outdoor equipment or emergency preparedness supplies. Designed to provide multiple useful tools in a lightweight package, this multitool easily fits into a pocket, backpack, tackle box or survival kit.

Featuring a knife blade, scissors, nail file and nail cleaner, this pocket-sized multitool is equipped to handle a variety of everyday tasks both at home and outdoors. Whether you're camping, hiking, fishing, hunting, backpacking or assembling a bug out bag, this mini multitool offers convenient functionality without adding unnecessary bulk.

Measuring approximately 2.25 inches when closed, the compact design is easy to carry and store. Each tool locks into place during use for reliable operation, while the integrated keyring allows the multitool to be attached to keys, backpacks, belt loops, camping gear and other accessories for quick access.

From outdoor adventures to everyday utility needs, this mini pocket knife multitool delivers practical convenience in a compact, travel-friendly design.
Key Features
  • MULTIPLE TOOLS IN ONE - Includes a knife blade, scissors, nail file and nail cleaner for everyday utility and outdoor tasks
  • COMPACT EDC DESIGN - Measures approximately 2.25 inches when closed for easy pocket, pack or kit storage
  • INTEGRATED KEYRING ATTACHMENT - Built-in keychain ring allows convenient attachment to keys, backpacks and gear
  • LOCKING TOOL FUNCTIONALITY - Individual tools lock into position during use for reliable performance
  • IDEAL FOR OUTDOOR USE - Great for camping, hiking, fishing, hunting, emergency kits and everyday carry setups
Specifications
MPN: ASROPK-BLUE
UPC: 810131700607
Knife Type: Folding Multi Tool
Tools Included: Blade, Scissors, Nail File, Nail Cleaner, Locking Tools, Keyring
Intended Use: EDC, Camping, Hiking, Travel, Emergency Preparedness
Carry multiple essential tools in one compact package with the ASR Outdoor Mini Pocket Knife Multi Tool. Designed for everyday carry, camping and emergency preparedness, this lightweight multitool combines a knife blade, scissors, nail file and nail cleaner in a convenient pocket-sized design.

The multitool folds down to approximately 2.25 inches for easy storage and transport, making it a useful addition to backpacks, tackle boxes, survival gear and travel kits. Each tool locks securely into position when opened, while the built-in keyring allows for convenient attachment to keys, bags, outdoor gear and other everyday carry equipment. Compact, versatile and easy to carry wherever your adventures take you.
